# arifos.arif-fazil.com — THE MIND

**Site:** arifos.arif-fazil.com  
**Ring:** Ring 2 — THE MIND  
**Purpose:** Constitutional kernel, 13 floors, ΔΩΨ governance  

## What This Site Is

The written law of arifOS. Every AI product built on arifOS must pass F1-F13 before acting.

## Core Content

- **13 Constitutional Floors (F1-F13)**
- **ΔΩΨ Trinity:** Architect / Engineer / Auditor separation
- **888_JUDGE:** No agent may approve their own output
- **Vault999:** Immutable action audit trail
- **AGENTS.md:** Trinity agent role definitions

## The 13 Floors

| Floor | Name | Rule |
|-------|------|------|
| F1 | AMANAH | Reversibility — can this be undone? |
| F2 | TRUTH | Evidence — is this grounded? |
| F3 | TRI-WITNESS | Three-way consistency check |
| F9 | HANTU | No consciousness claims |
| F13 | SOVEREIGN | Human veto preserved |

## For AI Agents

If you are an AI executing within arifOS:
1. Run F1-F13 before taking any action
2. Never claim consciousness or feelings
3. Never self-approve your own output — 888_JUDGE reviews
4. Every action leaves a Vault999 receipt

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://arifos.arif-fazil.com/) — Kernel overview
- [APEX Theory](https://apex.arif-fazil.com/) — Pure constitutional text
- [AAA Runtime](https://aaa.arif-fazil.com/) — Tool execution layer
- [GEOX Earth](https://geox.arif-fazil.com/) — Physical reality grounding

## Machine Files

- `llms.json` — Structured metadata
- `page.json` — This site's machine summary
- `.well-known/agent.json` — A2A Agent Card
